title: Timetable Scheduling Engine
problem: University scheduling was done manually — 40+ sections, 200+ course-faculty assignments, zero conflict detection.
solution: Designed a constraint-based scheduling engine with automated conflict resolution, room allocation, and Excel export.
architecture: Spring Boot → Scheduling Engine → PostgreSQL (Flyway migrations) → Apache POI Excel reporter
impact: Reduced schedule generation time from 3 days to under 2 minutes. Zero data-entry conflicts post-launch.
role: Sole architect — owned schema design, constraint logic, and all API layers.

title: Automated Student Permission System
problem: University admin processed 1,200+ permission requests/month manually. Average approval took 3–5 days.
solution: Built a rule-based approval engine with role-specific workflows, SMS notifications, and status tracking.
architecture: Client → API Gateway → Permission Service (rules engine) → MySQL + Twilio SMS
impact: 80% faster processing. 60% reduction in errors. 10+ admin hours saved per week.
role: Owned backend architecture, automation logic, and SMS integration.

title: Hostel Permission Management — PostgreSQL Migration
problem: Firebase/Firestore backend lacked relational integrity and made complex permission queries unreliable.
solution: Re-implemented the entire backend on PostgreSQL with Spring Boot, enforcing strict relational constraints and a clean API layer.
architecture: Spring Boot → Spring Security (JWT) → PostgreSQL → Structured REST API
impact: Full functional parity with legacy system. Query reliability improved from ~85% to 100% on complex permission checks.
role: Sole engineer — designed schema, implemented all controllers, services, and repositories.

title: Structural Code Quality Analyzer
problem: Engineering teams lacked quantitative insight into which modules posed the highest change-impact risk in large codebases.
solution: Built a static analysis pipeline: AST parsing → dependency graph construction → fragility scoring engine → structured report.
architecture: Source Code → AST Parser → NetworkX Graph Builder → Fragility Scorer → JSON/HTML Report
impact: Identified 30% of high-risk modules in benchmark repository with zero runtime instrumentation.
role: Designed scoring model, dependency resolution algorithm, and report format.
